all.en: I was driving home from work along a quiet country road last Tuesday.
all.zh: 上週二，我下班後正沿著一條安靜的鄉間小路開車回家。

all.en: Suddenly, a strange grinding noise came from somewhere under the hood.
all.zh: 突然間，引擎蓋下方傳來奇怪的摩擦聲。

all.en: The dashboard lit up with several warning lights at the same time.
all.zh: 儀表板上同時亮起了好幾個警示燈。

all.en: I pulled over to the shoulder and turned on my hazard lights immediately.
all.zh: 我立刻把車停到路肩，並打開警示燈。

all.en: When I tried to restart the engine, it refused to turn over at all.
all.zh: 我嘗試重新發動引擎，它卻完全沒有反應。

all.en: There was almost no cell signal in that remote area between the hills.
all.zh: 在山與山之間那個偏僻的地方，幾乎完全沒有手機訊號。

all.en: Fortunately, an elderly farmer in a small truck soon stopped behind me.
all.zh: 幸好，一位開著小貨車的年長農夫不久後停在我後面。

all.en: He offered to drive me to the nearest gas station about ten kilometers away.
all.zh: 他主動載我到約十公里外最近的加油站。

all.en: The mechanic there called a tow truck and explained my likely problem.
all.zh: 那裡的技師幫我叫了拖車，並解釋了可能的問題。

all.en: It turned out that the alternator had completely died after years of use.
all.zh: 後來才知道，發電機在多年使用後已經完全壞掉了。

all.en: The repair was expensive, but I was grateful for the farmer's kindness.
all.zh: 修車費很貴，但我非常感謝那位農夫的善意。

all.en: After the tow truck arrived, the mechanic gave me a fair repair estimate.
all.zh: 拖車到達後，技師給了我一個合理的修車估價。

all.en: Although it was costly, I knew that ignoring the issue would be worse.
all.zh: 雖然金額不便宜，但我知道忽視這個問題只會更糟。

all.en: I called my office the next morning to request a day of leave.
all.zh: 隔天早上，我打電話到公司請了一天假。

all.en: My boss was understanding and even shared a similar breakdown story of his own.
all.zh: 主管很體諒，甚至分享了他自己一次類似的拋錨經驗。

all.en: Later, I drove back to the country road to thank the kind farmer.
all.zh: 後來，我特地開車回到那條鄉間小路，向那位善良的農夫道謝。

all.en: I brought him a basket of fresh fruit and a homemade lemon cake.
all.zh: 我帶了一籃新鮮水果，還有一塊自製的檸檬蛋糕給他。

all.en: He invited me into his small kitchen for a cup of strong oolong tea.
all.zh: 他邀請我到他簡樸的廚房裡，喝一杯濃郁的烏龍茶。

all.en: We chatted about his farm, his grandchildren, and his decades of country life.
all.zh: 我們聊到他的農場、孫子，以及他幾十年的鄉村生活。

all.en: Before leaving, he insisted I take home a heavy bag of fresh vegetables.
all.zh: 離開前，他堅持要我帶一大袋新鮮蔬菜回家。

all.en: A car breakdown, I realized, had introduced me to a wonderful new friendship.
all.zh: 我體會到，這次拋錨竟為我帶來了一段美好的全新友誼。

all.en: A month later, the farmer surprisingly arrived at my apartment with his small truck.
all.zh: 一個月後，那位農夫意外地開著他的小貨車來到我家公寓。

all.en: He brought a large box of homegrown rice from his family's small field.
all.zh: 他帶來了一大箱自家小田種的稻米。

all.en: My neighbors stared curiously as we carried it up the narrow stairs together.
all.zh: 我們一起把它搬上狹窄的樓梯時，鄰居們好奇地盯著看。

all.en: I invited him inside for a proper homemade dinner with my family.
all.zh: 我邀請他進屋，和我家人一起享用一頓豐盛的家常晚餐。

all.en: My mother prepared his favorite dishes after asking him several careful questions.
all.zh: 媽媽小心地問了幾個問題後，做了好幾道他最喜歡的菜。

all.en: He laughed and said the city food was finally as good as his wife's.
all.zh: 他笑著說，城裡的食物終於和他太太煮的一樣好吃了。

all.en: Before leaving, he invited my entire family to his farm next summer.
all.zh: 離開前，他邀請我們全家明年夏天到他的農場玩。

all.en: My parents accepted immediately, eager to escape the busy city for a weekend.
all.zh: 父母馬上就接受了，迫不及待想在週末逃離繁忙的城市。

all.en: We exchanged phone numbers and promised to stay properly in touch.
all.zh: 我們交換了電話號碼，並約定要好好保持聯絡。

all.en: A simple breakdown, I realized, had grown into something truly remarkable.
all.zh: 我體會到，一次單純的拋錨，已經發展成一段真正難得的緣分。

all.en: The following summer, our whole family finally visited the farmer's quiet rural home.
all.zh: 隔年夏天，我們全家終於拜訪了那位農夫安靜的鄉間住處。

all.en: His wife greeted us at the gate with iced barley tea and warm smiles.
all.zh: 他太太在門口迎接我們，端著冰涼的麥茶，笑容溫暖。

all.en: The farmer proudly walked us through his small rice fields and vegetable garden.
all.zh: 農夫驕傲地帶我們走過他小小的稻田和菜園。

all.en: My father asked endless questions about traditional planting techniques and seasonal cycles.
all.zh: 爸爸問了無數關於傳統種植技術和季節循環的問題。

all.en: My mother helped prepare lunch in their bright country kitchen with the wife.
all.zh: 媽媽和農夫太太一起在他們明亮的鄉村廚房準備午餐。

all.en: We ate freshly steamed rice with vegetables we had picked just an hour earlier.
all.zh: 我們吃著剛蒸好的米飯，配菜是一小時前才剛採摘的蔬菜。

all.en: His grandchildren arrived later and taught me how to feed their friendly chickens.
all.zh: 他的孫子稍後也來了，教我怎麼餵他們家親人的雞。

all.en: That afternoon felt slower and richer than any vacation I had taken before.
all.zh: 那個下午比我去過的任何假期都更悠閒、更豐盛。

all.en: Before we left, the farmer handed us seeds to start our own small balcony garden.
all.zh: 離開前，農夫遞給我們一些種子，讓我們在自家陽台開始種植。

all.en: A simple breakdown, I realized again, had quietly opened a door to country life.
all.zh: 我再次體會到，一次簡單的拋錨，悄悄地為我們打開了通往鄉村生活的大門。

all.en: That winter, the farmer's wife called us to share difficult and sudden family news.
all.zh: 那年冬天，農夫太太打電話給我們，分享了一個沉重又突如其來的家中消息。

all.en: Her husband had fallen on the rice field and was resting at home now.
all.zh: 她先生在稻田裡跌倒了，目前正在家中休養。

all.en: My parents immediately drove down with homemade soup, fresh fruit, and quiet love.
all.zh: 父母立刻開車南下，帶著自製的湯、新鮮水果，與安靜的關懷。

all.en: The farmer smiled weakly but seemed deeply moved by our long thoughtful journey.
all.zh: 農夫虛弱地笑著，但似乎被我們這段漫長而貼心的旅程深深打動。

all.en: We stayed for two days, helping with small farm chores and warm evening meals.
all.zh: 我們待了兩天，幫忙做些農場小事，並一起吃溫暖的晚餐。

all.en: His grandchildren arrived from Taipei and quietly thanked us for our kind support.
all.zh: 他的孫子從台北趕來，安靜地為我們的善意支持表達感謝。

all.en: By the third evening, the farmer insisted on walking us slowly to our parked car.
all.zh: 到了第三天傍晚，農夫堅持要慢慢地送我們到停車處。

all.en: He pressed a small handwritten note into my mother's gentle waiting palm.
all.zh: 他把一張手寫的小紙條，塞進媽媽溫柔等待的掌心。

all.en: It simply said that our family had become his second family across the years.
all.zh: 上面只簡單寫著，這些年來我們已成了他的第二個家庭。

all.en: A breakdown, I realized once more, had quietly become a lifetime of warm visits.
all.zh: 我再次體會到，那次拋錨悄悄地化為一輩子溫暖的探望。
